sections.paragraph:
i.q. רֵישׁ m. poverty, Pro 30:8, from the root רוּשׁ.

ראש

Ch. i.q. Hebr. רֹאשׁ-

(1) the head, Dan 2:38. חֶזְוֵי רֵאשָׁךְ visions of thy head, which are presented to thy mind, Dan 4:2, , 10 7:15 .

(2) the sum, head, amount of any thing, Dan 7:1. Pl. רֵאשִׁין Dan 7:6, and like the Hebrew רָאשִׁין, Ezr 5:10.

I.
